card.name: Dwarven Metalsong
card.text: Search your library for an Equipment, Fortification, or Vehicle card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Generous Gift
card.text: Destroy target permanent. Its controller creates a 3/3 green Elephant creature token.

card.name: Monument of Victory
Ondu Inversion
card.text: Destroy all nonland permanents. --- (Back): Ondu Skyruins

card.name: Ondu Skyruins
card.text: Ondu Skyruins enters tapped. {T}: Add {W}. --- (Front): Ondu Inversion

card.name: Requisition Raid
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {1} — Destroy target artifact. + {1} — Destroy target enchantment. + {1} — Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature target player controls.

card.name: Retreat to Emeria
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, choose one — • Create a 1/1 white Kor Ally creature token. • Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Timeless Dragon
card.text: Flying Plainscycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.) Eternalize {2}{W}{W} ({2}{W}{W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a token that's a copy of it, except it's a 4/4 black Zombie Dragon with no mana cost. Eternalize only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Village Outctops
card.text: When this Fortification enters, draw a card. Whenever fortified land becomes tapped, you gain 1 life. Fortify {1}. Activate only once each turn. ({1}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Bastion of Knowledge
card.text: Fortified land has "{T}: Draw a card." Fortify {2}{U}. Activate only once each turn. ({2}{U}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Coastal Breach
card.text: Undaunted (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each opponent.) Return all nonland permanents to their owners' hands.

card.name: Glacial Preserve
card.text: As this Fortification enters, choose a card name from among the card names of lands with a mana ability. Whenever this Fortification becomes attached to a land, for as long as this Fortification remains attached to it, you may have that land become a copy of the land with the chosen name. Fortify {4} ({4}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Mystic Communion
card.text: Voyage — Scry X, where X is the number of differently named lands you control, then draw two cards.

card.name: Omensight
card.text: Voyage — Draw a card, then if you have fewer cards in hand than the number of differently named lands you control, repeat this process. You have no maximum hand size until your next turn.

card.name: Rewind
card.text: Counter target spell. Untap up to four lands.

card.name: Vedgard's Echos
card.text: Draw three cards. Islandcycling {1} ({1}, Discard this card: Search your library for an Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Avalanche Jotnar
card.text: Voyage — When this creature enters, it deals damage to target creature or planeswalker equal to the number of differently named lands you control. Mountaincycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Nesting Dragon
card.text: Flying Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a 0/2 red Dragon Egg creature token with defender and "When this creature dies, create a 2/2 red Dragon creature token with flying and ‘{R}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.'"

card.name: Planar Sundering
card.text: Voyage — Planar Sundering deals X damage to each creature and each planeswalker, where X is the number of differently named lands you control.

card.name: Raiders' Encampment
card.text: Fortified land has "{T}: Creatures you control gain haste until end of turn." Fortify {R} ({R}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Resonating Runestone
card.text: Whenever you activate an ability of fortified or equipped permanent, if that ability isn't a mana ability, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy. This ability triggers only once each turn. Fortify {2} ({2}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.) Equip {2} (When you activate this, it will become unattached from anything it's attached to.)

card.name: Valakut Exploration
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card for as long as it remains exiled. At the beginning of your end step, if there are cards exiled with this enchantment, put them into their owner's graveyard, then this enchantment deals that much damage to each opponent.

card.name: Avenger of Zendikar
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 0/1 green Plant creature token for each land you control. Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, you may put a +1/+1 counter on each Plant creature you control.

card.name: Crop Rotation
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a land. Search your library for a land card, put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Druid Class
card.text: (Gain the next level as a sorcery to add its ability.) Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, you gain 1 life. {2}{G}: Level 2 You may play an additional land on each of your turns. {4}{G}: Level 3 When this Class becomes level 3, target land you control becomes a creature with haste and "This creature's power and toughness are each equal to the number of lands you control." It's still a land.

card.name: Elvish Aberration
card.text: {T}: Add {G}{G}{G}. Forestcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Explore
card.text: You may play an additional land this turn. Draw a card.

card.name: Farmstead Settlement
card.text: Fortified lands you control have "{T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery." Fortify {2}{G}. Activate only once each turn. ({2}{G}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Gifts of the Realms
card.text: Converge — Look at the top seven cards of your library. Choose up to X different permanent types, where X is the number of colors of mana spent to cast this spell. For each card type chosen this way, you may reveal a card of that type from among those cards and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Lief, Vedgard Realmkeeper
card.text: When Lief enters, create two colorless Fortification artifact tokens named Vedgard Garrison with "Fortified land is indestructible," "Whenever fortified land becomes tapped, target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn," and fortify {3}. {R}{G}{W}{U}, {T}: For each fortification and each equipment you control, you may attach that artifact to a permanent it could fortify or equip.

card.name: Long Way Home
card.text: Search your library for a land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Flashback {3}{G} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Omenpath Journey
card.text: When this enchantment enters, search your library for up to five land cards that have different names, exile them, then shuffle. At the beginning of your end step, choose a card at random exiled with this enchantment and put it onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Oracle of Mul Daya
card.text: You may play an additional land on each of your turns. Play with the top card of your library revealed. You may play lands from the top of your library.

card.name: Outland Settlements
card.text: Fortified land has "{T}: Create a 1/1 white Viking creature token." Fortify {1}{G}. Activate only once each turn. ({1}{G}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Pir's Whim
card.text: For each player, choose friend or foe. Each friend searches their library for a land card, puts it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffles. Each foe sacrifices an artifact or enchantment they control.

card.name: Protected Paradise
card.text: Whenever fortified land becomes tapped, add one mana of any color. Fortify {2}. Activate only once each turn. ({2}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Rampaging Baloths
card.text: Trample Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, you may create a 4/4 green Beast creature token.

card.name: Realms Uncharted
card.text: Search your library for up to four land cards with different names and reveal them. An opponent chooses two of those cards. Put the chosen cards into your graveyard and the rest into your hand. Then shuffle.

card.name: Ulvenwald Hydra
card.text: Reach This creature's power and toughness are each equal to the number of lands you control. When this creature enters, you may search your library for a land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Whisper in the Woods
card.text: {T}: Untap target land. {5}{G}, Sacrifice this creature: Put six +1/+1 counters on target land you control. It becomes a becomes a 0/0 Elemental creature with haste that's still a land.

card.name: Wrenn and Seven
card.text: [+1]: Reveal the top four cards of your library. Put all land cards revealed this way into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. [0]: Put any number of land cards from your hand onto the battlefield tapped. [-3]: Create a green Treefolk creature token with reach and "This creature's power and toughness are each equal to the number of lands you control." [-8]: Return all permanent cards from your graveyard to your hand. You get an emblem with "You have no maximum hand size."

card.name: Apex Worldpost
card.text: Untap all fortified lands you control during each player's untap step. Fortify {1} ({1}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Bergen, Renowned Conqueror
card.text: Voyage — When Bergen enters, distribute X +1/+1 counters among any number of target creatures, where X is the number of differently named lands you control. If an ability of a permanent you control triggers while you control ten or more lands with different names, that ability triggers an additional time.

card.name: Borborygmos and Fblthp
card.text: Whenever Borborygmos and Fblthp enters or attacks, draw a card, then you may discard any number of land cards. When you discard one or more cards this way, Borborygmos and Fblthp deals twice that much damage to target creature. {1}{U}: Put Borborygmos and Fblthp into its owner's library third from the top.

card.name: Dynaheir, Invoker Adept
card.text: Haste You may activate abilities of other creatures you control as though those creatures had haste. {T}: When you next activate an ability that isn't a mana ability this turn by spending four or more mana to activate it, copy that ability. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Escape to the Wilds
card.text: Exile the top five cards of your library. You may play cards exiled this way until the end of your next turn. You may play an additional land this turn.

card.name: Fractured Identity
card.text: Exile target nonland permanent. Each player other than its controller creates a token that's a copy of it.

card.name: Horizon Treader
card.text: Haste This creature can't be blocked. This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Kilvik Sage
card.text: Voyage — When this creature enters, scry X, where X is the number of differently named lands you control, then reveal the top card of your library. If it's a permanent card, draw a card.

card.name: Kiora's Follower
card.text: {T}: Untap another target permanent.

card.name: Obuun, Mul Daya Ancestor
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, up to one target land you control becomes an X/X Elemental creature with trample and haste until end of turn, where X is Obuun's power. It's still a land. Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Primal Monolith
card.text: Fortified land is a 6/6 Giant Spirit creature with vigilance and haste that's still a land. Fortify {5} ({5}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Radiant Skies
card.text: Search your library and/or graveyard for a Plains card, an Island card, a Swamp card, a Mountain card, and a Forest card, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Basic landcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Tatyova, Benthic Druid
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, you gain 1 life and draw a card.

card.name: Tocasia, Dig Site Mentor
card.text: Creatures you control have vigilance and "{T}: Surveil 1." (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put that card into your graveyard.) {2}{G}{G}{W}{W}{U}{U}, Exile Tocasia from your graveyard: Return any number of target artifact cards with total mana value 10 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Urban Evolution
card.text: Draw three cards. You may play an additional land this turn.

card.name: Vedgard Gardens
card.text: Whenever a fortified land you control becomes tapped, you gain 1 life. Fortify {1}. Activate only once each turn. ({1}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Venture the Realms
card.text: Voyage — Create a 1/1 white Viking creature token for each differently named land you control.

card.name: Worldsoul's Rage
card.text: Worldsoul's Rage deals X damage to any target. Put up to X land cards from your hand and/or graveyard onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Awakened Amalgam
card.text: Voyage — Awakened Amalgam's power and toughness are each equal to the number of differently named lands you control.

card.name: Blackblade Reforged
Commander's Sphere
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity. Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Explorer's Scope
card.text: Whenever equipped creature attacks, look at the top card of your library. If it's a land card, you may put it onto the battlefield tapped. Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Heimr, the Great Gate
card.text: Heimr enters tapped. Heimr has all activated abilities of all lands on the battlefield. You may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to pay the activation costs of Heimr's abilities.

card.name: Living Memorial
card.text: (Living Memorial isn't a spell. It's white, it's affected by summoning sickness, and it has "{T}: Add {W}.") When Living Memorial enters, sacrifice it unless you pay {W}. Vigilance Living Memorial gets +1/+1 for each permanent attached to it that you control.

card.name: Opal Palace
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity. If you spend this mana to cast your commander, it enters with a number of additional +1/+1 counters on it equal to the number of times it's been cast from the command zone this game.

card.name: Public Thoroughfare
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, sacrifice it unless you tap an untapped artifact or land you control. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Scattered Groves
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {W}.) This land enters tapped. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Sheltered Thicket
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {G}.) This land enters tapped. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Vedgard Stronghold
card.text: ({T}: Add {W}.) Vedgard Stronghold enters tapped unless you control a Forest and an Island. {2}{G}{W}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice Vedgard Stronghold: Search your library for a Fortification card, put it onto the battlefield, attach it to a land you control, then shuffle. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Bitterthorn, Nissa's Animus
card.text: Living weapon (When this Equipment enters, create a 0/0 black Phyrexian Germ creature token, then attach this to it.) Equipped creature gets +1/+1. Whenever equipped creature attacks, you may search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Equip {3}

card.name: Radiant Summit
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {W}.) This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.

card.name: Canopy Vista
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {W}.) This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.

card.name: Cinder Glade
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {G}.) This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.

card.name: Scorched Geyser
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {R}.) This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.

card.name: Exotic Orchard
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color that a land an opponent controls could produce.

card.name: Irrigated Farmland
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {U}.) This land enters tapped. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Coastal Peak
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {R}.) This land enters tapped. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Prairie Stream
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {U}.) This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.

card.name: Rain-Slicked Copse
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {U}.) This land enters tapped. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Glittering Massif
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {W}.) This land enters tapped. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Thriving Bluff
card.text: This land enters tapped. As this land enters, choose a color other than red. {T}: Add {R} or one mana of the chosen color.

card.name: Thriving Grove
card.text: This land enters tapped. As this land enters, choose a color other than green. {T}: Add {G} or one mana of the chosen color.

card.name: Thriving Heath
card.text: This land enters tapped. As this land enters, choose a color other than white. {T}: Add {W} or one mana of the chosen color.

card.name: Thriving Isle
card.text: This land enters tapped. As this land enters, choose a color other than blue. {T}: Add {U} or one mana of the chosen color.

card.name: Sodden Verdure
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {U}.) This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.
